panels.title: Tokens Over Time
panels.description:
Daily token consumption broken down by type. Stacked bars show composition; the line on top shows the daily total.

- **Input** — new tokens sent to Claude in this turn (content beyond what was already cached).
- **Output** — tokens Claude generated in its response.
- **Cache read** — tokens served from prompt cache (cheap; reused context).
- **Cache creation** — tokens written into prompt cache (one-time cost; amortized across subsequent reads).
- **Total** — sum of input + output + cache read + cache creation per day.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp, 'Europe/Madrid') AS time, SUM(t.input_tokens) AS input, SUM(t.output_tokens) AS output, SUM(t.cache_creation_tokens) AS cache_creation, SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens) AS total FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Active Sessions
panels.description: Number of distinct Claude Code sessions per day, excluding subagents. Useful for correlating usage spikes with workload.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS sessions FROM sessions WHERE started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND is_subagent = false GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Usage Utilization Trend
panels.description: Percentage of your plan's rate limit consumed over 5-hour and 7-day rolling windows. Approaching 100% means you'll hit throttling.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, utilization_pct, window_name FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name IN ('five_hour', 'seven_day') AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Current Plan
panels.description: Your detected Claude plan (PRO, MAX5, MAX20). Derived from the latest OAuth API poll.

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan FROM usage_snapshots ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
